revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
revision.text:
{{ombox | type = notice | image = [[File:Information icon dark green.svg|40px|link=|alt=]] | style = border: 2px solid #008560; | textstyle = font-size: 120%; text-align: center | text = Are you new here? If so, [[Help:Introduction|welcome]]! There {{#if:{{{2|}}}|are simplified versions of this page at '''[[{{{1|<includeonly>{{error|Error: no page specified}}</includeonly>}}}]]''' and '''[[{{{2}}}]]'''|is a simplified version of this page at '''[[{{{1|<includeonly>{{error|Error: no page specified}}</includeonly><noinclude>Help:Referencing for beginners [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude>}}}]]'''}}. }}<noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Beginner_version here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive.
